results.title: Kevin Diaz
highlights:
Staff Data Scientist at Royal Caribbean Group
...
Staff Data Scientist (Senior Lead) at [Royal Caribbean Group](https://www.linkedin.com/company/royal-caribbean-group)
...
Detail-oriented Accountant turned Data Scientist leveraging advanced analytics and AI to solve complex business problems. I thrive in fast-paced environments, where I’ve demonstrated my ability to deliver innovative solutions across multiple industries, including travel, retail, and marine operations. I’ve led projects that resulted in substantial cost savings and operational improvements, such as developing an AI-driven supply chain model that generated $48M in annual cost avoidance and creating an energy efficiency model that saved $1.5M annually. I take pride in driving change through technology while mentoring teams, bridging cross-functional gaps, and fostering a culture of data-driven decision-making. As a team-first leader, I’ve managed and coached professionals at all levels, from direct reports to classroom cohorts, helping them build analytical skills and confidence. Currently, I leverage my passion for data and strategy to help shape the future of Royal Caribbean Group, ensuring measurable, data-backed success. Whether building predictive models, optimizing operations, or teaching the next generation of analysts, I remain committed to using technology to create meaningful business impact. Let’s connect if you’re interested in data science, innovation, or simply love a good AI use case!

results.title: Yuvraj Puri
highlights:
Data Scientist | Artificial Intelligence | Machine Learning | Data Mining | Software Engineer
...
AI Data Scientist at [Royal Caribbean Group](https://www.linkedin.com/company/royal-caribbean-group)
...
I’m a data scientist with 3+ years of practical experience in artificial intelligence, machine learning, research design, and using data-driven tools. I have obtained my Masters of Data Science degree from Harvard this past May. I’m passionate about pursuing the nascent AI field and shaping its future with the end goal of linking people and AI more closely. With well designed experiments and continuous improvement, AI can make people’s lives significantly better. I’ve led multiple exciting projects as an algorithm developer. A recent one that I’m very proud of is the development of an expert-to-client matching algorithm. While it is still relatively new, early customers have given high marks on satisfactions surveys. Another noteworthy project I’ve led is the creation of a startup incubation screening algorithm. This tool supports executives in making strategic investment decisions based on data analysis which leverages multiple factors such as financial metrics and market trends. I have also worked on a project for FEMA to automatically label instances of damage from disasters in images obtained from the air at oblique and nadir angles. This tool utilizes a combination of object detection (specifically, YOLO) and a large language models (OpenAI GPT-4o, LLaMa 3.2, or the vision language model PaliGemma) to detect, label, and caption the damage for FEMA personnel with the intent to accelerate disaster response and providing aid. In addition to an unified legacy and contemporary data ingestion pipeline, I have also created a prototype using ArcGIS's out-of-the-box tools for the Jet Propulsion Lab and NASA with the intent to expand upon their MISR Research and Lookup tool, MERLIN, by adding additional visualizations and metadata for more detailed analyses. Beyond these projects, my experience in healthcare and education has given me valuable insights into industries ready for targeted AI integration. Understanding the nuanced needs of end users drives my commitment to delivering impactful solutions in every project I undertake. If you would like to connect or know more about my professional story, please don’t hesitate to send me a LinkedIn message or email me at yuvraj
...

results.title: Senior Analyst, Onboard Revenue | Remotepulse
highlights:
# Senior Analyst, Onboard Revenue
...
This position is classified as “in-office.” As an in-office role, it requires employees to work from a designated Carnival office in South Florida Tuesday through Thursday each week. Employees may work from their homes on Mondays and Fridays. Candidates must be located in (or willing to relocate to) the Miami/Ft. Lauderdale area. The Onboard Revenue Senior Analyst is responsible for leveraging data analytics and advanced modeling techniques to drive revenue optimization and enhance the guest experience across onboard operations. It involves analyzing complex datasets, developing predictive models, and maintaining robust data infrastructure to support strategic decision-making. The Onboard Revenue Data Scientist will work closely with revenue management, onboard operations, marketing, finance, and IT teams to uncover insights, streamline processes, and implement data-driven solutions that align with business goals. The ideal candidate will have strong analytical skills, experience with machine learning and data visualization, and a collaborative mindset to thrive in a cross-functional environment.
...
- Researching and prototyping machine learning models aimed at improving demand forecasting, dynamic pricing, and guest behavior prediction.
...
- Staying informed on emerging AI technologies and evaluating their potential applications within cruise revenue operations is a continuous responsibility.
...
- Bachelor’s degree in data science, Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Economics, Engineering or related quantitative field
...
- 6+ years of experience with
...
- Familiarity with data visualization tools such as Tableau, Power BI, or similar platforms
...
- Basic knowledge of machine learning algorithms and their applications
...
work with large
...
- Experience creating compelling data visualizations and presentations
...
- Ability to create compelling data visualizations and presentations

results.title: Ben Fowler
highlights:
Senior Data Science Manager, Analytics & Artificial Intelligence at Royal Caribbean Group
...
Senior Data Science Manager, Analytics & Artificial Intelligence at [Royal Caribbean Group](https://www.linkedin.com/company/royal-caribbean-group)
...
As a seasoned Senior Data Science Manager at Royal Caribbean Group, I lead initiatives that drive significant business impact through cutting-edge AI and machine learning applications. My focus encompasses delivering production enterprise solutions for demand forecasting, customer satisfaction optimization, talent matching, e-commerce analytics, and operational efficiency enhancement. Through collaborative leadership and cross-functional liaising, I ensure the seamless delivery and interpretation of data-driven insights to empower informed decision-making across the enterprise. Skills: • Production-ready code for model training and deployment at scale • Cloud computing, specifically Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, Azure Data Lake Storage (ADLS), Databricks and AWS Sagemaker • Microsoft Azure Data Factory for data integration and workflow automation • Distributed computing with PySpark, especially in handling large datasets • Machine learning, including feature engineering, feature selection, anomaly detection modeling and time series modeling • Statistical diagnostics and statistical sampling • Model evaluation, selection, and interpretability with SHAP • Business analytics, data mining, and visualization of information specifically with Plotly, Seaborn, Altair, Matplotlib and Streamlit • Conducting A/B testing, experimental design and causal analysis • Leading data scientists, collaborating with stakeholders and reporting to executives
...
#### Senior Data Science Manager, Analytics & Artificial Intelligence (Current)
...
I lead data science and AI initiatives that power smarter decisions across Royal Caribbean’s global operations—including supply chain, e-commerce, and contact center operations. My work focuses on building scalable, reliable, high-impact solutions that drive both operational excellence and customer satisfaction. I bridge the gap between business strategy and technical execution, translating complex data into actionable insights. My role spans hands-on modeling, business reporting, team leadership, stakeholder engagement, and product development—delivering measurable value in a dynamic, fast-paced environment. Passionate about innovation, I bring a startup mindset to corporate transformation—using data to navigate ambiguity, unlock growth, and deliver memorable experiences for millions of guests worldwide.
...
#### Data Science Manager, Analytics & Artificial Intelligence

highlights:
Royal Caribbean Group has positioned itself as a leader in cruise industry AI transformation, with CEO Jason Liberty declaring it a strategic imperative for winning share of the $2 trillion vacation market[1][2]. The company has embedded AI deeply across operations, managing 15 million daily price points with 90% AI automation, a task previously requiring hundreds of revenue managers[1][2]. Royal Caribbean's comprehensive AI strategy spans revenue optimization, operational efficiency, guest personalization, and sustainability initiatives, supported by strategic partnerships with technology providers and significant digital platform investments[3][4][5].

● Gathered and curated a diverse and comprehensive dataset of retinal scans encompassing various eye diseases, ensuring data quality and appropriate labelling. ● Employed state-of-the-art deep learning models, including VGG16, ResNet-50, and DenseNet-121, for the task of disease classification. These pre-trained models were fine-tuned on the acquired dataset. ● Conducted an extensive comparative analysis of the models to evaluate their performance. Metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and ROC-AUC were employed, with a particular emphasis on achieving robust results for early disease detection. ● Achieved a remarkable 91% accuracy in identifying eye diseases, highlighting the potential of deep learning in revolutionizing early disease diagnosis and intervention in ophthalmology. I am a Data Analyst & Business Intelligence Specialist at Royal Caribbean Group, where I leverage my Computer and Information Science background to drive data-driven insights that improve guest experiences and operational efficiency. I specialize in data ingestion, transformation, and cloud computing, optimizing data pipelines with tools like Databricks, PowerBI, and SQL Server Management Studio. I work closely with cross-functional teams to turn complex data into actionable intelligence, helping to enhance both shoreside and shipboard operations. Previously, I gained valuable experience at Citibank, where I contributed to Global Functions Technology in Risk Management & Compliance and the Chief Operating Office. I developed and tested JavaScript APIs, created data visualizations with Tableau for strategic decision-making, and utilized Kafka for real-time data streaming. I also applied AWS Lambda and DynamoDB in cloud-based projects, improving the functionality of credit risk management applications. My blend of technical expertise in JavaScript API development, cloud computing, and business intelligence enables me to tackle complex challenges while delivering business outcomes. Let's connect to explore how I can add value to your team.

results.title: Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization | CareerSync
highlights:
Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization | CareerSync
...
# Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization
...
Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence are at the heart of the Airbnb product. From Trust to Payments, and from Customer Service to Marketing we rely on ML to ensure that guests and hosts have the best possible experience with Airbnb.
...
The CS AI product team is responsible for driving CSxAI (Customer Support x Artificial Intelligence) initiatives by adopting the Generative AI technologies to enable an intelligent, scalable and exceptional service experience. The team develops and enhances various AI models, ML services and tools including LLM fine-tuning, alignment and optimization, RAG/Search, LLM evaluation and testing automation, feedback-based learning and guardrail for a wide range of applications in Airbnb.
...
As a principal machine learning engineer, you will be responsible for fine-tuning state-of-the-art LLMs for diverse use cases while optimizing models for high-performance deployment on Airbnb’s ML Infrastructure. You will partner with product managers, software engineers, data scientists and operation teams to brainstorm, design and develop AI products such as AI Assistant, Autonomous agent, recommendation, travel planning, and many more products that make meaningful impacts in the world of travel.
...
- Work with large scale structured and unstructured data; explore, experiment, build and continuously improve foundation models for Airbnb product, business and operational use cases.
...
- Create a multi-year tech roadmap that enables our team to stay on the leading edge of the rapidly evolving AI landscape and leverage the best in class technologies to deliver customer benefits.
...
- Continuously evaluate recent and upcoming large foundational models, ensuring the selection and refinement of the highest quality models for enhanced performance and efficiency.
...
- Hands-on prototype, develop and productionize LLM models and pipelines at scale, including both batch and real-time use cases.
...
- Drive key AI architectural decisions for products, and contribute to Airbnb’s ML platform architecture and strategy.
...
- Minimum Qualifications:
...
- PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Mathematics, Statistics, or related technical field.
- 10+ years of experience with developing machine learning models and products at scale from inception to business impact.
...
- Programming experience in Python and hands-on experience with frameworks such as PyTorch.
...
- Proven record of training, fine tuning, optimizing models and inference run-time
...
- Post-training experience in areas like data processing for fine-tuning; responsible LLMs; LLM alignment; reinforcement learning; efficient training and inference; language model evaluation; and/or multilingual and multimodal modeling.
...
- Or specialized experience in runtime optimizations, model quantization, compression, on-device inference, GPU inference, pytorch, kernel development
...
- Preferred Qualifications:
...
- PhD in AI, machine learning, data science, or related technical fields.

- Publications at peer-reviewed AI conferences (e.g., NeurIPS, CVPR, ICML, ICLR, ICCV, and ACL).
...
- Customer Support Systems: Experience with AI technologies in customer support applications.
...
- Agile Practice for AI production: Experience with the entire AI product development lifecycle from incubation to production at scale, following agile practices in the Applied AI/ML domain.
...
- Infrastructure Acumen: Experience deploying and scaling business-critical AI services and driving architectural requirements on ML infrastructures

Description
- We are looking for a Data Scientist - Agentic Developer to design cutting-edge AI solutions and autonomous systems focused on agentic workflows and generative AI technologies. This position will be full-time and remote.

...
Stay abreast of latest developments in agentic AI, autonomous systems, language models, and generative AI technologies.
...
- What You'll Need
- Required:
- BE, Master's or Ph.D. in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, or equivalent practical experience
...
4-8 years of overall technical experience with 0-2 years of hands-on experience in Generative AI and LLM technologies
...
1+ years of experience building agentic systems, workflow automation, or autonomous AI applications
...
Deep hands-on experience with agentic frameworks (AutoGen, LangGraph, CrewAI, Agency Swarm, or similar)
...

...
Proven track record of deploying and optimizing LLM models for inference in production environments
...
Extensive experience with LLM orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex required)
...
Hands-on experience with Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker JumpStart, and other cloud-based LLM platforms
...
Expertise in RAG architectures, Fine-tuning techniques, and Prompt Engineering
...
Expert in NLP techniques and deep learning libraries (Transformer models, LSTM, BiLSTM, CNN, BERT, GPT, T5)
...
